_publications._publicationTitle: Frequent EGFR Positivity and Overexpression in High-Grade Areas of Human MPNSTs.

_contextSnippet: we performed CISH and FISH analysis on eight MPNST samples...None of the tumour had evidence of EGFR amplification...FISH revealed a polysomy of chromosome 7 for this tumour
resourceName: LSI EGFR probe (Vysis-Abbott Molecular Diagnostics, Baar, Switzerland)
details: Successfully performed FISH analysis on 8 MPNST samples, revealing no EGFR amplification and detecting polysomy of chromosome 7 in one case
